task_completion.description: The investment portfolio file is opened in the portfolio management application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application window (e.g., Portfolio Performance) is open and the title bar or active file indicator shows 'investment_portfolio.xml'.

task_completion.description: The Apple Inc (AAPL) security is located and selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the securities list or 'All Securities' view, 'Apple Inc' or 'AAPL' is visible and highlighted/selected.

task_completion.description: The CSV import dialog is configured with the correct file, delimiter, and column mappings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An import dialog is visible showing the file path 'aapl_historical_quotes.csv', the delimiter set to semicolon (;), and the columns correctly mapped to 'Date' and 'Quote' (or 'Close').

task_completion.description: The historical quotes for Apple Inc are successfully imported and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Historical Quotes' tab or view for Apple Inc shows a populated list or chart of daily closing prices spanning from January 2024 to June 2024.

task_completion.description: The updated portfolio file is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save button is clicked, a 'File -> Save' menu action is triggered, or the file name in the title bar no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk *).

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the portfolio application to perform the import.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the portfolio software's menus and dialogs, not a text editor or IDE modifying the XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the CSV import functionality rather than manual entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV import wizard/dialog is visible in the trajectory, proving the data was loaded from the file rather than typed in one by one.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run Python scripts, sed, awk, or other command-line tools to inject the CSV data into the XML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target security is Apple Inc (Ticker: AAPL, ISIN: US0378331005). The source file is '/home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/aapl_historical_quotes.csv'.
